---
title: "prexorctl logs"
description: "Stream or page recent log records from PrexorCloud components"
---

<!-- auto-generated by tools/gen-cli-docs.ts — do not edit by hand. -->

Stream or page recent log records from PrexorCloud components.
Run with --follow to open the live tail view (filter with /, pause with p,
scroll with j/k). Without a subcommand, logs --follow tails the controller.

## Usage

```text
prexorctl logs [flags]
  prexorctl logs [command]
```

## Flags

```text
--follow          Continue streaming new log records in the live tail view
    -h, --help            help for logs
        --level string    Minimum log level (TRACE/DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR) (default "INFO")
        --logger string   Only include records from loggers with this prefix
        --tail int        Number of recent records to print before streaming (default 200)
```

## Global flags

```text
--ascii               Use ASCII glyphs only (no unicode box drawing, sparklines, etc.)
        --context string      Override active context for this invocation
    -c, --controller string   Override controller URL
    -j, --json                Output in JSON format
        --no-color            Disable colored output
    -t, --token string        Override auth token
    -v, --verbose             Show HTTP request/response details
```

## Subcommands

- [`controller`](./logs-controller/)
- [`daemon`](./logs-daemon/)
